case_title: SHANNON MOVING LLC VS. SURAJ RAJWANI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-24-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-24-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF SHANNON MOVING LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KEITH MULLIGAN, CO-OWNER. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHANNON MOVING LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHANNON MOVING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ $2,325.00 PRINCIPAL, $54.14 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,429.14 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED FOR THE WRIT ISSUED: 11/20/2018. AS TO DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,325.00 FILED BY SHANNON MOVING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED AUG-02-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHANNON MOVING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00, FOR TOTAL AMOUNT OF OUTSTANDING PACKING; MOVING BILL PLUS COSTS. ON ITS OWN MOTION THE COURT VACATES THE JUDGMENT DATED 9/24/18 & ORDERS ENTRY OF THIS AMENDED JUDGMENT. THE TOTAL AMNOUNT DEFENDANT OWES PLAINTIFF EXCEEDS THE JURISDICTIONAL MAXIMUM BUT PLAINTIFF WAIVED THE EXCESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHANNON MOVING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ
